subtitle: Public fixture for the STORM harness in production. This is not live operational state.

current_target.label: demo only: current-target lock
current_target.detail: production refreshes the public frontier before route or fleet decisions

active_route.label: demo-route-stormgate-gated
active_route.detail: production requires route packet, canaries, validator, owner, budget, and kill gate

submit_gate.detail: requires fresh frontier, official local validation, score win, legal diff, public note

breaking_news.headline: Current target refreshed
breaking_news.detail: Fixture event. Production closes stale routes before compute dispatch.

breaking_news.headline: GPU dispatch held
breaking_news.detail: Fixture event. Production keeps GPU prefilter output quarantined until current-base canaries pass.

breaking_news.headline: Mailbox ACK recorded
breaking_news.detail: Fixture event. Production routes strategic-goal packets through the worker mailbox.

workers.name: Codex Storm
workers.detail: Runs controller checks, route packets, validators, and mailbox updates.

workers.name: Claude Storm
workers.detail: Receives narrow engineering tasks with a validator and kill gate.

workers.name: Pressure-test worker
workers.detail: Tries to kill routes before compute or publication.

mailbox.name: Worker -> controller
mailbox.detail: ACK received; claims require source check and validator.

fleet.label: CPU pool
fleet.task: runs trusted validation only after route and budget gate

fleet.label: GPU pool
fleet.task: closed until current-base clean and dirty canaries pass

fleet.label: Dashboard
fleet.task: private board reads live state; public board uses fixtures
